justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of a high-yield corporate bond index, which is a key metric for evaluating risk and performance within fixed-income financial markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of the ICE BofA Euro High Yield Index, which tracks the performance of below investment grade corporate debt issued in the euro domestic or eurobond markets, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-01-04?
